summary:
MIDDLE EAST TENSIONS AND MILITARY VISIONS: Brandon describes vivid visions of subterranean military activities in Iran, where underground railroads and tunnels are being used to transport military equipment and biological weapons toward the Strait of Hormuz and Israel. He recounts seeing smugglers moving payloads and strategic rocket attacks designed to bypass the Iron Dome by using lagging missiles carrying chemical agents. Brandon expresses concern over the escalation of these conflicts, praying for the exposure of biological weapons and the protection of civilians and military bases from such bombardments.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND STRATEGIC ALLIANCES: Brandon outlines a complex web of international tensions, highlighting an impending conflict involving China, Taiwan, Japan, South Korea, and Australia. He notes that while the United States is preoccupied with the Middle East, China may use the distraction to attack Taiwan. Furthermore, he describes an alliance forming between Russia, North Korea, and Turkey, pointing out a Turkish leader attempting to control strategic waterways near the Black Sea and the Istanbul Canal. Brandon foresees a massive escalation in Ukraine involving unconventional weapons and heavy artillery, warning that these alliances could trigger a major war across Europe affecting global supply chains.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND TERRORISM: Brandon recounts recent violent events, including a deadly shooting in Austin, Texas, perpetrated by an attacker from East Africa. He warns of sleeper cells within the United States plotting multiple coordinated attacks, which he describes as small-scale 9/11s, aimed at cities like New York, Chicago, Las Vegas, and Honolulu. Specific visions include vehicles used as weapons, explosives in subways near the East River, and mass shootings at a Hawaiian mall. Brandon emphasizes the need for vigilance and prays for divine protection over American citizens, infrastructure, law enforcement, and political figures like Donald Trump, JD Vance, and Marco Rubio.

INTERNATIONAL REVIVAL AND POLITICAL SHIFTS: Brandon prophesies significant transformations in several nations, including a brief window of spiritual revival in Iran and North Korea. He envisions a permanent lifestyle and economic shift in Cuba. Additionally, Brandon warns college students against traveling to Mexico for spring break, citing imminent military operations against cartel leaders and subsequent retaliatory violence and kidnappings. He also predicts an assassination of Reza Pahlavi who will be shot while delivering a speech.

HEAVENLY SIGNS AND ARCHAEOLOGICAL DISCOVERIES: Brandon interprets an upcoming blood moon visible over the West Coast, Hawaii, and Asia as a symbolic harbinger of war in the Pacific region. Alongside celestial signs, he prophesies major archaeological breakthroughs resulting from earthquakes and receding rivers. These discoveries will include artifacts and ancient hieroglyphics depicting reptilian entities in Egypt, which Brandon claims will scientifically validate biblical accounts such as the days of Noah and spark widespread spiritual awakening.

CHURCH REFORMATION AND HEALING DECLARATIONS: Brandon foresees a massive reformation within the global church, specifically mentioning the Catholic Church being cleansed of false doctrines and traditions. He envisions the destruction of racial and ethnic barriers within Christian communities, paving the way for a unified, worldwide revival spanning Africa, Asia, and the Americas. Additionally, Brandon teaches on biblical healing, applying scriptures from Deuteronomy and Galatians to rebuke chronic illnesses and specifically claiming spiritual authority over conditions like long COVID. He encourages listeners to expect supernatural breakthroughs, financial surplus, and relational blessings as they enter the month of March.
rawData: [March 02, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/fjuTrDgdUgA]-[I've been doing a lot of videos back to back praying with y'all, but we have a lot of work to do and I feel we make a lot of headway together. Many hands make light work. So, you'll have to bear with me again. All right, there's enough here. Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We're going to pray. I feel in my spirit we have great victory and I've been praying into it all day long. I am rejoicing, believing that the things that happen in Texas today are not going to happen anymore. I know what I've seen, but I know what the word says concerning our protection and being in the right place at the right time. Many of you may not know about the attack that happened today. If you want to show them what happened today, I'll go over some of the things the Lord showed us last night in prayer. A lot of that was about tunnels underground and the military of Iran taking what was in one area and putting it in another area, making sure that what they had was not going to be found by the American troops or by strikes, trying to hide it deeper in the earth. Now, I thought that was interesting. It was like a railroad under the earth, underneath the soil of Iran with huge caverns. I could see train cars. That's how big this was underground, like train cars that had military equipment and they were moving it from places that were more vulnerable to places that were more secure. I could see them taking them closer to what would be the Strait of Hormuz. It was taking it towards what would be Israel. They were going deeper underground. I could see these men. They had lights. It looked like smugglers. As I was looking into that, we're going to pray into that tonight, even more so praying into an uncovering and bringing them to justice. They were taking it towards Iraq. These tunnels look like they were headed towards the Iraq area. I saw them moving like that. So they'd be going west. We're going to pray that they won't be able to hide it. There's no place to hide. There's no place to bury any biological weapons or weapons of mass destruction. As I was seeing these payloads on rockets, they didn't have enough to put it on all of them, but there were certain ones trying to figure out how to get past the Iron Dome, being strategic in their strikes so that they would send so many ahead. Now, this is very strategic. What I'm telling you, I saw by the spirit of God. They would bombard it with a bunch of them at once. The Iron Dome and these defense systems, the Patriot or whatever, would try to get the first ones, but the one that they would miss would be the one lagging behind and that was the one with the bad stuff on it. So it was so busy with the first that the one behind had the bad thing. It missed this one because it was so busy with the first ones. So it shot in and it was able to hurt people more. It was some kind of chemical, something. I don't know. Y'all, I only tell you what I see. I don't know how to describe it. A lot of times I'm doing the best I can with the vision I have because I don't understand all the military stuff. But I'm going to tell you this was the same thing praying over Abraham Lincoln, praying over our servicemen and women in our military bases. We see the bombardment of all the rockets. Braden showed me they had 500 go off at one time. It goes along with what the Lord was showing me. Have they used those special weapons? I don't believe they have yet. I pray they haven't, but it looks like stars falling, just raining down like Christmas. It's bad. Have y'all seen that? Can you show them that? That is pretty substantial. I can't even imagine living there and watching TV or whatever in your living room and that going on outside and thinking it's time to get out of here. But we pray for peace. We pray for them to lay down their weapons and go on. You know, they're saying we have so much more. If you kill one, we'll just raise up another one right there the next day to take the position. We don't care what you do. We're not giving up. We'll keep bringing in new military. If you eliminate that leader, we'll bring in another one the next day. We're not going to give up what we believe and all this stuff. It's really interesting. How far will this go? How far will this escalate? I'm waiting for what I keep seeing concerning North Korea and Russia. Will they get involved with this or will cool heads prevail? I keep praying into what I keep seeing praying over Taiwan as the main target. Praying over that island for the Taiwan people, the Taiwanese. Praying over their allies with South Korea, Japan, Australia, praying for them to stand strong that they would have this glory dome around them that I keep seeing by the hand of God protecting these people. That China will have a coup in their camp with their military and with Xi, that there'll be a coup, some kind of overthrowing, that there'll be so much confusion that they'll turn on themselves. Kim Jong-un is another one that I truly believe we pray against any kind of retaliation from him. I saw paranoia trying to come on his mind as he was worried because he sees how President Trump has got Venezuela, now he's next. I truly believe it's Cuba that's next. I believe Cuba will be next after all this. How fast will this end? We're going to pray tonight for divine protection again over our troops, over our men and women of service that are protecting our homeland. God bless these people that are risking their lives for us. Some people agree with this, some people don't. It seems to be split all over social media. I see everybody. You got people that are far left and far right that are mad. You got left people that are happy and far right people that are happy. This is really interesting because it's like a huge mixing pot. Watching other nations, where is everybody with all this? Russia seems to be pretty upset about it. I don't know, as I keep praying into it, like I said, we don't pray the news. If you're praying the news, you're missing it. You must come up higher in your prayer life. An eagle doesn't fly with the crows. It flies up high. I'm going to be an eagle. I'm not a crow or a chicken. Chicken tastes good, but it ain't somebody I want to hang around. You got to come up higher in what I'm trying to tell y'all in your prayer life. It's not time to pray the news. We must see beyond the news. It's already too late. Russia President Putin says the assassination of Iran's Supreme Leader is a brutal murder that violates ethics and international law. Wow. That's a pretty bold statement for somebody who kills 20,000 people a month in Ukraine. I mean, wow. Calling the kettle black, huh? I mean, that guy has no room to talk. He's murdered more people in the last two years than anyone; he's like a Hitler. But with Ukraine and all that sadness that's going on over there, the bloodshed that's happening, it's terrible. So we're going to pray over Hawaii. Now, I thought this was interesting, and I'm not going to sit here and talk a long time because I don't want to keep y'all a long time tonight. I appreciate y'all being here so many nights in a row, and you've prayed with me. We added up over six hours of prayer time in the last couple of days of video, and a lot of you have watched all of it, praying with me, and so I want to honor your time. But okay, so the blood moon tomorrow night. Is it tomorrow night? Yeah, the third. So it would be Monday night going into Tuesday. It's not Tuesday night going into Wednesday because that's not the third. So it's actually going to be tomorrow night, the blood moon. Yeah, today's the first or second... third. Yeah, let's see. So whatever it is, I believe it's probably Tuesday. It might be Tuesday night. That night going into... well, it can't be Tuesday night going into that. It's Monday night going into Tuesday. Has to be because it turns the next day; it's in the morning. So tomorrow night, the total lunar eclipse of the blood moon will be visible Tuesday night. Tomorrow night—well, today's Sunday. So whatever, it's over Hawaii. The main totality is from the West Coast, where it's visible, the big part like I'm talking about where it's a full blood red moon. You know, there are phases, and the East Coast is not very much, Central a little bit more, West Coast full blood moon, Hawaii full blood moon big time, South Korea, Taiwan full blood moon big time. Now Israel, nothing at all. Africa, nothing at all. Europe, nothing at all. So this is interesting. The war and all this is happening, this blood moon and the representation, which I believe blood moons—from what we understand from Jonathan Cahn and some of these others who have told us—represent war. So where is it going to be seen? It's not even seen over Iran in that area. It's seen over Asia. It's seen over Hawaii. And I had great caution concerning Hawaii. Praying over Hawaii. Praying over Asia. Praying over Australia. Why? Because of what we saw two videos ago. The Lord said, "Watch and pray," because I saw Australia getting involved, South Korea, Japan, Taiwan, China, and North Korea. All this conflict starting over there in that area. So, it was separate conflicts from the one that's going on right now with the United States of America, but we were preoccupied. And in being preoccupied with what's going on with Iran, I saw China raise up to try to take Taiwan. So where's the blood moon? And that's why I went "whoa," because it's over that area. Is that coincidence or is it symbolic? So as we pray tonight, I really truly believe to cover Taiwan even more in prayer, covering South Korea in prayer because China is going now that America is preoccupied. You know, here they're upset because of what happened with Venezuela and their oil. Okay, that's where they got a major portion of their oil: Venezuela and Iran. And from what I understand, those are their two major sources they bought oil from for a good price. I think it was $25 a barrel or whatever it was. So they were getting it for a really good deal from what I was understanding. Braden was showing it to me: $25 a barrel. Now, both sources are under attack. So China, Venezuela, and this are all... and so now what happens with all that? Does China sit by idly and allow Taiwan to be something that they've wanted to obtain for decades now? And we see what's going on, and this is what I saw. And that's why I pray for a coup in their camp, that there will be confusion for our brothers and sisters in Taiwan. That they will not become communist. They will not interfere with South Korea. They will not interfere with Japan and these other nations. That there will be confusion in their own camp, that they would turn on themselves as they try to come against the people. They turn on themselves just like they did in the Bible. I believe it was when... remember in VeggieTales when Gideon and the army were in the... we've listened to it so many times from Megan because Megan, my little Megan, you know she's overcoming, she watches VeggieTales all the time on her iPad. And so she sits in the back and I hear... and so they all turned on themselves with the slushies. You know, don't you know what happened? I watched Bob and Larry. They're in the back telling me what's going on. You know, I love the cartoon. Megan does too. If you have kids, you know what I'm talking about. If you let your kids watch VeggieTales: The Sword of the Lord and Gideon. All right. Well, let's pray. You all want to take communion with me? I tried to make that short—13 minutes. Not too bad, huh? Was there anything you wanted to show? Oh, yeah, Braden had some clips. Yeah, don't worry. No, you're good. I don't... You've worked hard. I'm just... Yeah. So I was saying, you had the guy... where is it at? The guy wearing... this is the man that opened fire in Austin, Texas today. And I don't know how many people were injured. Any casualties? Yes. How many casualties? I think it might have been 50. I don't know. 50? Yeah. I mean, I don't... let me see. Didn't you tell me that, or you said? I don't know. But buddy, I don't know. Yeah. Your mama sends that stuff from people. I appreciate you all sending stuff to Diana. You give us breaking news a lot, so it helps out. So Diana sends it to Braden. They're saying three dead, 14 injured. Three. Okay. Three dead, 14 injured. Too many. Yeah, too many. And so we come against this now. Braden said Alex Jones is talking about how he believes there's going to be an attack on our soil. Now, this is what we've seen: a Red Dawn experience from the cells, the secret cells of people in America that the FBI and our Homeland Security don't even know about, that got over because of Sleepy Joe. Now, we believe with all our heart that the power of prayer changes things. And I know that we can change... they'll be found. You know, when you have a reprobate mind and you're working and functioning with the devil, you're not thinking with a full deck. The elevator is not going to the top. And so you automatically make mistakes because you're operating in a carnal mind. So I am believing for great mistakes in their plots and plans against Americans, foreign and... you know, all over the place, but especially over the mall in Hawaii. The three men I saw in Hawaii, in that mall area where the man where you put the flowers on his neck and he has the surfboard across the street. There's a mall there. There's Gucci, there's a Louis Vuitton. It's a real nice mall. I saw in that circle a mass shooting taking place in there back at Christmas. Now, I see in part, hear in part, and I know by the Spirit of God when He tells me that this is a plot and a plan for a mass event taking place in Hawaii. And why was it in Hawaii? Because they wanted to show that they have infiltrated every area of our nation. So we pray over Hawaii. We pray over that area. They were using their automobile—it was a van—to use it as a weapon against the people. And then I saw the same thing on the Vegas strip by the Trump building, his hotel, his casino hotel. Same with the attempted attack on Chicago, New York, and these other areas, right? So, we know by the spirit of God what they're planning before they even do it. So, we're going to pray against it and ask God to show us more. If the Lord wants to show us more, we're going to pray that we get every single thing and that we will uncover and expose the darkness before they have any avenue to get it done. Now, this man was not from—that happened last night or today. That man was not from Iran. He was from Africa from what I understand. Right? Am I saying that right? Yeah. Lone wolf sympathizers—this is what I talk about: lone wolf sympathizers. This is not the main show. Now, will they be patient and try to bring out their stupidity later on in the 250 years? I do not know. All I know is the Lord said this is a high time going up until July 4th, praying over this whole time frame between now, March 1st, going into July 5th, praying over our nation. Go ahead. They're saying Eritrean. He was from East Africa. So, the Lord said many, many small 9/11s throughout the nation. And that's what we've been praying about. How long have we been praying over that? Over a year. Since last January when I saw the 50-gallon drums and the barrels and all the things the Lord warned us about. We prayed over the inauguration and he moved it indoors, and I believe by the hand of the Lord, President Trump is still here and he is going strong and doing exactly—it's the hand of the Lord, it's the grace of God over all our people, but especially over his family, over the vice president, over people in his cabinet, praying for divine protection that the hand of the Lord would be with our people. I truly believe what happened over the last 48 hours is God liberating the people of Iran. What will they do with what they've been given? He said, 'If you remember what the Lord said, I will give the people of Iran a window of opportunity for a major revival.' A window, he said, does not last very long; it is not very big. A door is huge; a window is small. What will the underground church in Iran do with this opportunity? And then he said, 'I will do the exact same thing for North Korea.' Now, when it comes to Cuba and Mexico, I didn't see it as a window; I saw it as a whole lifestyle change forever. I saw a major door. I saw green going around Cuba in the days ahead with a spring of growth coming up out of the middle, if you remember. And then I saw an extension cord coming out of Cuba underground, going to Russia for some kind of business deal. Something is happening. I saw Cuba become powered with electricity that looked like some kind of internet and wealth growth. But a spring of growth came forth out of the land of Cuba in the days ahead. And the Lord said, 'It's just the blade. First the blade, then the ear, then the full corn.' I saw a beginning of a revival, but it wasn't something that ended; it was a new way of life for the Cuban people. And I believe with all my heart Marco Rubio will have a big hand in this. For Saul has his thousands and David has his ten thousands. And I saw great accomplishments by the hand of Marco Rubio in the days ahead with great favor concerning the Cuban people, the Venezuelans, and the Mexican people. I saw a new leader coming to Mexico. And I saw cartel leaders being taken out—big cartel people being taken out in the days ahead by our military. And it was three of them for sure that are coming really quick on top of the one that just got taken out. And then I saw them trying to retaliate, and the Lord even said pray over spring breakers—kids that go to Cozumel, Costa Maya, and Cancun—praying over young women specifically that would go down there for the party scene for spring break, which would be starting this month. March spring break starts in the next two weeks. He said specifically, 'Pray.' And if I had a kid, do not go to Mexico for spring break. That is dumb. In my opinion, some of you say, 'Well, Brandon, I think it'd be fun.' Well, then go. But I would go to Florida, personally. I don't dabble in your business; you do what you want to do. You're led by the spirit of God yourself. It's not my job. I can tell you what I think and you can say, 'Well, Brandon, I think you're wrong.' Well, that's fine; you're entitled to that. But I say the Lord said pray over the kids, college students specifically, young women going to Mexico concerning kidnappings and things. Okay. So, we're going to pray over that. We're going to pray over the trafficking. There are so many little things, but let's just follow the voice of the Holy Spirit and see what he wants. I could go on about everything that I think, but I want to be effective. It's like hitting a bullseye on a dartboard. You throw the darts and you can hit the red, or you can hit all over because 'all over' is what you think. But when you go by the leading of the Holy Spirit, you're going to hit that bullseye every single time, especially when you're praying in the spirit. And I believe that. So, that's what we're going to do. Father, we just thank you, Lord, for this time of prayer tonight. Lord, we thank you for every single person who's represented here. We plead the blood of Jesus over this nation. We thank you, Lord, for President Trump, for Vice President JD Vance. Father, I thank you right now in the name of Jesus over Marco Rubio and every single person who's represented in the cabinet, from Pam Bondi to all of them. I apply the blood of Jesus over Homeland Security, over our FBI, over our intelligence, our sheriff's departments, and our local law enforcement. We cover them in the blood of Jesus. I thank you, Father, right now. We take communion. We thank you, Lord, that by your stripes, we're healed. I jumped right into it and just skipped communion; I'm reason. I felt ready to jump in the river. Father, we take this body in the name of Jesus, and we thank you, Lord, that we're healed and whole. Amen. Lord, we take and honor the blood. We make much of the blood and we plead the blood of Jesus over us. I apply the blood over anything you want to show me, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I plead the blood of Jesus over my spiritual eyes. And I thank you, Lord, over my natural eyes, over my flesh. And I tell you, Satan, you're under our feet and we will not be snared by any familiar spirits. Father, I thank you, Lord, that we hear your voice and a stranger's voice we will not follow. We cover this time of prayer in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that greater is he that is in us than he that is in the world. And we plead the blood over us tonight in the mighty name of Jesus. And we give you all the glory, for we make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. Amen. Right now, we are covered in the blood. We're ready. I anoint myself with oil. Father, I plead the blood over my eyes. I thank you, Lord, for my spiritual life. I cover it in Jesus' name. And I put angels all around this house right now in Jesus' name, all around us warring on my behalf, warring on my wife's behalf, warring on Braden, Paisley, and Megan. Thank you, Lord, in the name of Jesus. Now, let's just go right back into it. Father, I thank you, Lord. Oh, Father, we plead the blood over our law enforcement, over our Secret Service that protect President Trump. Any tips that they would know—the fake ones from the real ones—that they would not be distracted by false alarms, but know the ones that are real. They'll have great discernment in knowing how to protect the Commander-in-Chief of this nation, President Trump. We lift him up before you, that he is strengthened in his blood and his bones. Father, the weight of this pressure of what he's going through right now, let it be easy and light. Let him be able to stand at his age; Father, let his youth be renewed like the eagles. Father, you give him sweet sleep when he sleeps, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We bind you off of his life in the name of Jesus. We plead the blood of Jesus over President Trump in the name of Jesus, that he is covered, and that there are angels of the Lord surrounding and about him right now. A thousand should fall at his side and ten thousand at his right hand. But Father, I thank you, Lord, that his mind is fixed on you, on the Word. Father, that he would even crack open the Bible and read it on a day-to-day basis; Father, that he would renew his mind. Father, I thank you, Lord, that he takes no counsel from the ungodly today. We thank you, Lord, that whoever is advising him on any kind of war decisions or any of the decisions concerning our nation, I thank you, Lord, that you're putting men and women of integrity who are being led by the Spirit of God all around him. I thank you, Lord, for Marco Rubio, that you keep him safe, Father; that he will slay his tens of thousands, and the one that slays the thousands, Father, after the term is over, would just ride off into the sunset. Thank you, Father. Yep, that's right. That is so right. I see it so clear. That's right. He would just ride off into the sunset on a donkey. He's closest to him, the donkey. He's going to ride off into the West on a donkey. Thank you, Lord. That is so clear. Father, I thank you, Lord, that Rubio would be raised up for such a time as this. You protect him. Thank you, Lord, for Pam Bondi. You protect her. Father, I thank you, Lord, that there will be people that have integrity around, and Father, that the Homeland Security, the DEA, all of our FBI, the NSA, all of the people who keep us safe, Father, have the tips and the people that are in the neighborhoods around these terrorists. Every plot, every plan—let you have the Sister Clipboards of the neighborhood, the neighborhood police watchdog, go over there and say, 'I see somebody over there,' and report it. I thank you, Lord, that you keep Sister Clipboards all vigilant in the neighborhoods. I'm not trying to be funny; I'm trying to be real. Keep them alert. Keep these people alert in these neighborhoods. And if they see something off, Father, they report it and be quick about it. Let them see something so that when they see an apartment complex or something wrong, Father, they would hear it and see it, and they say, 'There, these people... there's just something bad.' Let them be led by the Spirit of God, even if they don't know it. Every plot, every plan of every wicked person would be uncovered in the name of Jesus concerning this nation. Subway attacks next to the East River, trying to flood the river into the subway system—we come against you in the name of Jesus. Explosive devices in subways, in our mass transit—we call you uncovered in the name of Jesus by the East River, by the Hudson. We call every plot, every plan exposed in Jesus' name. In our buildings, in our skyscrapers in Chicago, Boston, Washington, Miami, Atlanta, Houston—over every area of every major influencing city, every plant, every plot—we call you brought to naught in Jesus' name. Even over Hawaii, around our malls where people get together and go shop and do things. Father, we thank you, Lord. I hear the sound of an abundance of rain. We hear the sound of an abundance of rain as you're turning this around in Jesus' name. We believe, Father. We believe. I see it turning around. We're going to see this. And Father, our people on our ships in the Mediterranean, in the straits—I call them protected from any drone attack, any kind of missile bombardment. I say in the receptors of the Patriot missile systems and the Iron Dome, we call them to be supernaturally run by angelic hosts, that every missile would not land on any house, that it would fall in an open area and not hit any civilians. We call all civilians protected in the name of Jesus. And our military bases—we call our military bases protected in the name of Jesus from any kind of biological attack, any kind of supersonic missiles or anything that's been sent from China; we call it down in Jesus' name. That every leader that rises up that has the same kind of spirit as the Ayatollah is removed in Jesus' name. That they would raise up a leader. Wow. I see it clearly there. Wow. I'm in the future. Do I say that out loud? Oh, Father, I praise you for all the things you show me. You know the man with the gray hair? I'm going to just say it. Pray for that prince to be protected. They're going to hurt him. He's standing making a talk and they take him out when he's making a speech. He's behind a platform, and he's going to have a suit on. He's making a speech and they take that man out. Not our people, their people. Corrupt men will hurt this man. I see this man being assassinated. Very clear vision. He's going to be talking and I see it: the actual projectile comes from—he's standing facing west—it comes from the northwest. The projectile will come from the northwest and it will shoot him and it will take him out right on the side. It goes through his body this way. I see it so clear. That man right there, I don't know if he'll be in power, but I see him being in power and his reign lasts for a small window. He'll be some kind of leader after all this is over. He'll lead, and then his reign will be short-lived. This is why the window will not last a long time. Lord, I always say what you say. I hear it so clear. I see him standing. He'll make a speech and it goes right through his side right here. It goes through him. It's very clear. I see that man on a stage. He's talking to a crowd. Oh Father, we thank you, Lord, for all that you show us, all the things that you give us. We stand in awe of you, Father. He said, 'Don't camp here. Keep moving. I have more to show.' This is in in Turkey. Watch Turkey. It's highlighted big before me. Watch Turkey. Holy, holy, holy are you, Lord. They're devising a plan right now. He is devising a plan right now. He's evil. Turkey... he's going to be making moves soon. He's making moves. He's upset. He's talking to somebody. It's Russia. It's Putin. I see Putin and the man over Turkey talking. Oh, he's trying to find a strategic partner. Does Turkey have... Don't look it up. They have big things. How do they say? Already? He'll beat his war drums just like I warned you before. He'll beat the war drums. It's about their water. It's about controlling that sea. It's the water up here. That's not the Mediterranean, is it, son? Is that the Black Sea? Yeah, right here. It's on this side. I see him trying to take his stuff and control this water. It's the water above it. It's right here. I see war drums in this water right here, all concerning this. I see now he has an outfit on like a vampire. He's looking toward the west and the Black Sea. He's studying. It's the entrance point for the sea. I see this looking like a stone with a face in it that looks almost like a dragon's face coming up out of the stone concerning this man. He has a black cape on with a black collar and he's standing there. It has a crest that keeps the cape on, a crest that goes on with a white shirt.
